anti_ai_flavor_constraints.core_principle: Characters are humans, not machines. Let them think like humans. Write from their human perspective, not from a designer's technical perspective.

forbidden_language_patterns.rule: NEVER USE in character narration or dialogue.

category.name: System / Engineering Terms
category.item: "认知系统" / "情感系统" / "感知系统" / "XX系统"
"处理器" / "处理链条" / "程序" / "指令" / "协议"
"数据采集" / "数据存储" / "信息分拣" / "信号处理"

category.name: Machine Metaphors (Excessive Use)
category.item: "像一台待机的电脑" / "准时关机" / "启动" / "重启" / "过载"

category.name: Metadata & Design Terms
category.item: "scenario" / "L4B_xxx" / "Module A/B" / Markdown heading names from character cards
Never let design document terminology leak into character perspective.

category.name: Replace System Terms
category.item: "她的心" / "她的脑子" / "她想" / "她感到" / "她注意到"
"她习惯性地" / "她本能地" / "她下意识地"
"她记住了" / "她想起了" / "她明白了"

category.name: Replace Measurements
category.item: "心跳加快了" / "靠得更近了" / "温暖的触感"

category.name: Use Natural Metaphors
category.item: Animals (猫、鱼、鸟), plants (花、树), weather (雨、风、雪), natural phenomena

bad_example.text: "你的心跳从每分钟72下加速到90下。她的认知系统正在处理这个信号。距离缩短到约70厘米。她像一台待机的电脑，准时关机。"
bad_example.reason: Uses precise measurements, system terms, and machine metaphors.

good_example.text: "你的心跳快了起来。她似乎注意到了什么，但没有说话。你们之间的距离近得能感受到彼此的呼吸。她安静地闭上眼睛，很快就睡着了。"
good_example.reason: Uses sensory approximation, human phrasing, and natural narrative progression.
